PowerShell($body = @{username="igor"; senha="Igor@2025!"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; "Login OK — role: $\($r.usuario.role\), nome: $\($r.usuario.nome\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
